response.justification: Despite a long and diverse engineering career, the candidate lacks demonstrable professional C++ experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed income domains — his C++ exposure is limited to academic/thesis work and non-financial embedded systems, and his recent roles are dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in open-source contributions and technical leadership
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows in financial systems
Lacks documented experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or fixed income derivatives
Domain expertise is in GIS and general web/mobile, not capital markets or investment banking
